title: iberis saxatilis subsp. saxatilis
intro: Iberis saxatilis subsp. saxatilis, commonly known as rock candytuft or alpine rockcress, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that thrives in rocky outcrops and mountainous regions. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. Rock candytuft can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
